query:
-- Now update tiab_services to link to the new services
UPDATE tiab_services ts
JOIN services s ON s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn AND ts.msisdn != '' AND s.phoneNumber != ''
SET ts.internalServiceExternalId = s.externalId,
    ts.reconStatus = 'matched'
WHERE ts.reconStatus = 'customer_matched';

-- Final check on tiab_services
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_tiab_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalServiceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND internalServiceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked_to_service,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'customer_matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as still_customer_matched_only,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_tiab_services
FROM tiab_services;

-- Now update tiab_services to link to the new services
UPDATE tiab_services ts
JOIN services s ON s.phoneNumber = ts.msisdn AND ts.msisdn != '' AND s.phoneNumber != ''
SET ts.internalServiceExternalId = s.externalId,
    ts.reconStatus = 'matched'
WHERE ts.reconStatus = 'customer_matched';

-- Final check on tiab_services
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_tiab_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN internalServiceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND internalServiceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked_to_service,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as matched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN reconStatus = 'customer_matched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as still_customer_matched_only,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_tiab_services
FROM tiab_services;
